---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or use case

What are you trying to do, and what is the gap today?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can — API shape, config changes, UI behaviour.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about, and why they don't fully solve the problem.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or any other context.
